seoTitle: Piambong vs Picketts Valley — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Piambong and Picketts Valley. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Piambong vs Picketts Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Piambong and Picketts Valley.
heading: Piambong vs Picketts Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Piambong, New South Wales and Picketts Valley, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Picketts Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Piambong (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Piambong or Picketts Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Piambong has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Picketts Valley scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Piambong scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Picketts Valley scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Piambong or Picketts Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Picketts Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
